name: Poe (Quora)
what_it_does: Quora's AI platform providing a unified API to access multiple LLMs (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini) and build custom bots deployable on Poe's infrastructure.
use_cases: Accessing multiple LLMs through a single unified API without managing separate provider accounts
Building and deploying custom AI bots with specialized prompts that run on Poe's infrastructure
Creating agents that route queries to the best model for the task from a single integration
Prototyping multi-model AI applications with streaming and attachment support
Building composable bots where one bot calls another bot as a subroutine
not_for: Production applications requiring guaranteed SLA on underlying model availability
Use cases requiring direct API access to a specific model provider's full feature set
best_when: Best when you want to build custom AI bots backed by multiple LLMs and deploy them on Poe's platform without managing separate provider API keys.
avoid_when: Avoid when you need fine-grained control over model parameters or require guaranteed access to specific model versions.

auth.notes: API key from Poe creator dashboard. fastapi-poe SDK handles bot server authentication for incoming Poe requests.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Limited free bot interactions; usage varies by underlying model cost
pricing.paid_tiers: Poe subscription from $20/month; API usage billed per message point based on model
pricing.notes: Pricing is message-point based where different underlying models cost different amounts. Costs pass through from underlying providers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by subscription tier and underlying model; not publicly detailed

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: fastapi-poe SDK provides clear error handling patterns. Underlying model errors surface through the SDK.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: LLM completions are not idempotent by nature; same query produces variable outputs.
known_agent_gotchas: Bot server must be publicly accessible for Poe to call it; requires hosting or tunneling during development
Underlying model availability depends on Poe's agreements with model providers, not guaranteed
Message point costs can be unpredictable if routing dynamically across expensive models

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Bot server verification uses access key validation. No published compliance certifications.
